data.status: renovations still required
data.short_description: Third location of a Memphis-area pizza chain coming to Wedgewood Commons in Olive Branch, MS. The space previously housed Hollywood Feed and requires renovation before opening. No opening timeline is available.

data.status: debuting soon
data.short_description: A second location of the Columbus Sri Lankan snack and bubble tea restaurant is coming to Powell, OH. The new spot will be larger than the existing Short North carryout location, with the same menu offerings. No opening date has been released.

data.status: plans for spots in Beverly Hills and Studio City this summer
data.short_description: New York-based coffee chain Blank Street is planning two Los Angeles locations — Beverly Hills and Studio City — marking its first West Coast presence. The brand serves espresso, matcha and baked goods and launched in 2020 as a Brooklyn coffee cart.

data.status: plans for spots in Beverly Hills and Studio City this summer
data.short_description: New York-based coffee chain Blank Street is planning two Los Angeles locations — Beverly Hills and Studio City — marking its first West Coast presence. The brand serves espresso, matcha and baked goods and launched in 2020 as a Brooklyn coffee cart.

data.status: targeting an August or September opening
data.short_description: Ballantyne restaurant Miró Spanish Grille is expanding to a second SouthPark location in the former Fontana di Vino space at 4905 Ashley Park Lane. The 4,000-square-foot restaurant will offer approximately 80% of the same menu as the original, including empanadas, paellas and Spanish wines.

data.status: now listed as closed
data.short_description: InSession Soundbite Lounge at 1239 W Lake Street has closed and is being replaced by a new concept, Pitch & Pour Supper Club. The space previously hosted Tribe Supper Club before InSession took over.

data.status: hoping to open sometime in May
data.short_description: An all-day restaurant and live music concept, Pitch & Pour Supper Club, is taking over the former InSession Soundbite Lounge space in Chicago's Fulton Market District. The concept will serve breakfast, brunch, happy hour and late-night offerings alongside a cocktail and wine list.

data.status: set to level up Springfield this summer
data.short_description: A microbrewery and retro arcade concept by husband-and-wife owners Matthew and Stephanie Courchain is coming to Springfield, PA this summer. The venue will feature at least 10 vintage arcade games, roughly 15 seats, and a two-barrel brewing system offering beer, seltzers and nonalcoholic beverages.

data.status: as of now, the owners have not settled on an opening date
data.short_description: Cherokee Steakhouse, which shuttered earlier in 2026, is reopening under four new co-owners at its original location at Cherokee Marina in Lebanon, TN. The revived concept will focus on steak, seafood and chops, with bar snacks, pizzas and a possible brunch program; hiring is currently underway.

data.status: planning to take its fast-and-approachable model to Greenwich Village
data.short_description: Popular NoMad sushi concept Sendo is planning a second location at 43 W 8th St in Greenwich Village, NY. The new 900-square-foot, second-floor space will seat 29 guests and offer beer and wine, significantly expanding on the original 300-square-foot location.

data.status: a return could be imminent
data.short_description: New Orleans-themed bar and restaurant Ninth Ward is preparing to reopen at 180 Second Ave in the East Village after closing in 2016. Signage is now visible at the address, and the reimagined space will feature a gut-renovated interior accommodating roughly 74 guests, with a focus on New Orleans-inspired food and cocktails.

data.status: entering a new chapter under new management
data.short_description: Seattle's Capitol Hill bistro Americana has transitioned to new ownership under Jesus "Chuy" Mendoza Gamillo, Perfecto Mendoza Gamillo and Oscar Contreras Salazar. The comfort food and brunch spot continues daily operations from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m. with the same menu.

data.status: expected to open by the end of the year
data.short_description: Florida-based taco chain Talkin' Tacos has signed a lease at The Collection at Forsyth in Cumming, GA, marking its second Atlanta-area location. The brand has discontinued franchising in favor of corporate-owned expansion and has 15 locations in the pipeline for 2026.

data.status: targeting July 26 for a grand opening in Nashville
data.short_description: Florida-based taco chain Talkin' Tacos is entering the Nashville market with a 2,562-square-foot location at 135 Second Ave. N., targeting July 26 for a grand opening. The brand, which launched as a food truck in 2020, now has 35 locations and is pursuing rapid corporate-owned expansion.

data.status: opening very soon
data.short_description: The Peach Cobbler Factory is set to open its first New England location at 77 Summer St in Boston's Downtown Crossing. The 1,632-square-foot franchise space will offer roughly 90 dessert options including its signature peach cobbler, with dine-in, delivery, carryout and catering available.

data.status: owner has not yet announced an opening date
data.short_description: Ava's Place is expanding to a fourth location at 4511 Greenwood Court in Algonquin, IL, following city approval of a liquor license at a March 31 meeting. The bar and video poker concept's new location will occupy a fully renovated building that formerly housed Smoke & Vape Junction.

data.status: set to open next to Uchi
data.short_description: Bar Cicci, a new Italian concept from High Street Hospitality Group's Ellen Yin, is set to debut this spring at 1620 Sansom St in Philadelphia's Rittenhouse neighborhood. Few details have been released beyond the Italian theme and the group's emphasis on local purveyors and ethical sourcing.

data.status: set to open at The Refinery
data.short_description: Lou Lou's Tavern, a live music and late-night bar concept from Epic Hospitality co-founders Dave and Chrissy Lorenz, is set to open at The Refinery in Charleston, SC. The upscale tavern will feature charred wood bar tops, olive booths, vintage mirrored glass and an Americana-inspired small plates menu.

data.status: targeting an opening at Lost & Found during the last week of May
data.short_description: Local Indian ice cream shop Sarabha's Creamery is opening its second location at 3104 Gallatin Pike in the new Lost & Found development in East Nashville. Co-owner Gursharan Singh is targeting the last week of May for opening, emphasizing slow and intentional growth.

data.status: in the final stages of preparing for opening
data.short_description: Seafood boil franchise Crab N Spice is opening a new location at 8017 Atlantic Ave., Suite 103 in Cudahy, CA, operated by franchise owner Kevin Maranan who also runs the Carson location. The spot is in the final stages of preparation and expected to open this spring.

data.status: opening timeline for the Uptown location remains unclear
data.short_description: Local smoothie and acai shop Smooth Monkey is planning a new Uptown Charlotte location at 500 West Trade St., per a recent permit filing. The brand, which emphasizes fresh and natural ingredients, currently operates locations in Plaza Midwood and Strawberry Hill.

data.event_date: End of July / beginning of August 2026
data.status: hoping to open her location around the end of July or beginning of August
data.short_description: Chef and MasterChef Season 9 contestant Alecia Winters is bringing her comfort food concept Only Pans Cafe to the Rivertown Crossings Mall food court in Grandville, MI. The menu will feature Southern cuisine including chicken marsala, pasta, macaroni dishes and sourdough sandwiches.

data.status: opening timeline in Charlotte has not been announced
data.short_description: Texas-based La La Land Kind Cafe is opening a new Charlotte location at 1930 Camden Road in the former Bitty & Beau's space. The brand, founded in Dallas in 2019, serves specialty drinks and toasts and supports foster youth through paid internships.

data.status: officially closed its doors
data.short_description: Dos Olivos Markets closed its Dripping Springs location on April 5, 2026, after four years of operation. The company stated the closure was an intentional step to focus on expanding and refining its Buda and Harlingen locations.

data.location: 755 E Mulberry Ave, San Antonio, TX 78212
data.status: opening its doors on Tuesday, April 14, 2026
data.short_description: The Dispatch, a new neighborhood cafe concept by co-owners Chef Page Pressley and Dez Rodriguez of The Newstand Coffee & Sandwiches, is opening at McCombs Plaza on April 14, 2026 at 7 a.m. The community-focused cafe will serve coffee, specialty drinks, pastries, juices, smoothies and salads.

data.status: coming to NoHo
data.short_description: A dual concept combining the Grey Heron Café (an "apéro café") and Atany (a bespoke T-shirt tailoring shop) is planned for 2 Bleecker St in NoHo, per city application documents. The cafe will transition from upscale coffee and teas in the morning to cocktails and wine in the evening, with a 20-seat mid-century styled interior.

data.status: permanently closed its doors
data.short_description: King Maker Brewing permanently closed its Jacksonville Riverside taproom on April 4, 2026, after six years of operation. The craft brewery, founded in 2020, was known for its rotating taps and was a community gathering place hosting trivia nights and art meetups.

data.status: opening sometime in the coming weeks
data.short_description: Far Out Ice Cream is preparing to open its fourth location at 1930 Beacon St in Cleveland Circle, Brighton, in the former Energize juice bar space. The approximately 1,400-square-foot shop will serve New Zealand-style ice cream blended with real frozen fruit and also support the company's events and catering operations.

data.status: slated to open in the Valley next
data.short_description: Huey Magoo's chicken tender chain is opening inside Suncoast Casino at 9090 Alta Dr in Las Vegas, in partnership with Boyd Gaming. The owner targets a July or August opening, offering the same menu of hand-breaded or grilled tenders as its other 90+ locations.

data.status: set to fly and land in Converse this winter
data.short_description: A new Wingstop is planned for 4211 E Loop 1604 N in Converse, TX, per a recently filed permit. Construction is expected to start in early August and wrap up by November, with the location anticipated to open by winter 2026.

data.status: official opening date has yet to be announced
data.short_description: A newly constructed Long John Silver's is planned for 9950 FM 1960 in Humble, TX, per a recently filed permit. The $1.2 million, 2,247-square-foot quick-service restaurant project is expected to begin construction at the end of the month and wrap up by the end of September.

data.status: officially opened to the public on Tuesday, March 31, 2026
data.short_description: PLAY Sporting Lounge opened its flagship 12,000+ square-foot sports and entertainment venue at CityPlace Doral on March 31, 2026. The concept offers a chef-driven menu, two bars, live sports simulator suites, digital dart lanes and 60 televisions.

data.location: 3009 Ponce de Leon Blvd, Coral Gables, FL 33134
data.status: "coming soon"
data.short_description: Five Iron Golf, an indoor golf and entertainment venue, has filed permits to open at 3009 Ponce de Leon Blvd in Coral Gables, FL, with no opening date announced. The venue will feature golf simulators with 200+ virtual courses, bowling lanes, a full-service bar and a chef-inspired menu.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: Celebrity chef Stephanie Izard is opening Cabrita, a Peruvian concept, at Orlando International Airport's Airside 4 as part of a $10 million investment by airport restaurant operator Areas.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: Orlando's Milkhouse creative craft cocktail bar is opening at Orlando International Airport's Airside 4 as part of Areas' $10 million investment deal with the airport.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: Intercept Wine Bar, owned by NFL Hall of Famer Charles Woodson, is opening at Orlando International Airport's Airside 4 as part of Areas' $10 million airport investment. The bar features fine and sustainable wines.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: Detroit-style pizza concept SoDough Square, known for pizzas made with 24-hour fermented dough baked in steel blue pans, is opening at Orlando International Airport's Airside 1 as part of Areas' $10 million investment.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: Local ice cream brand Kelly's, offering more than 100 ice cream and sorbet recipes, is opening at Orlando International Airport's Airside 1 as part of Areas' $10 million investment deal.

data.status: expected to roll out in 2026
data.short_description: The Market, a gourmet and retail product concept, is opening at Orlando International Airport as part of Areas' $10 million investment deal with MCO.

data.status: restaurant will debut in either July or August
data.short_description: Briella's, a hot dog cart and food truck concept, is transitioning to a brick-and-mortar deli at 86 N Main Street in downtown Cedarville, OH, with a target debut of July or August. Co-owners Steve and Cassie Setzer are still seeking funding to complete the build-out, though they already have access to the building.

data.status: slated to open this fall
data.short_description: Patina Group and James Beard Award-winning chef Timothy Hollingsworth are opening Hundredfold, an American brasserie, at Five Ballpark Center in The Battery Atlanta this fall. The concept, which debuted in 2025 at New York's Belmont Park Village, offers a French-technique-inspired American menu including rigatoni pesto, croque madame and French bread pizzas.

data.location: 108 E Railroad Ave, Moncks Corner, SC 29461
data.status: no official opening date has been announced
data.short_description: Rollin Local sushi, hibachi and coastal comfort food restaurant is opening a second location at 108 E. Railroad Ave. in Moncks Corner, SC, joining its flagship in Georgetown. The restaurant is currently hiring and accepting applications on April 9.

data.status: it will be sometime in May
data.short_description: Northeast-based Dos Toros Taqueria is reopening its downtown Chicago location at 1 N Dearborn Street, the same address where it operated until 2022 before closing due to pandemic-related issues. No firm opening date has been set, but co-founder Leo Kremer confirmed it will be sometime in May.

data.status: making its way to New York
data.short_description: Yesterday's, a 6,500-square-foot two-level bar and restaurant inspired by classic NYC bar culture, is opening at 157 Bleecker St in the West Village. The concept will serve from weekend brunch through late-night and features two private event rooms, an expansive bar, and a design by Yakka Studio.

data.location: 9864 E Grand River Ave, Brighton, MI 48116
data.status: an opening date is yet to be announced
data.short_description: Brighton Nutrition, a protein shake and energizing tea concept, is opening at 9864 E Grand River Avenue #200 in Brighton, MI, in a space formerly occupied by Healthy's of Brighton. Owner Jamie Craig also operates Ypsilanti Nutrition, a nearly identical concept that opened in 2022.

data.status: set to reopen for the upcoming Jersey Shore season
data.short_description: OB Diner in Point Pleasant, NJ, closed for over a year, is set to reopen under new owner Chef Diego Sanchez. The diner will operate daily from 6 a.m. to 10 p.m., with extended 3 a.m. hours on Fridays and Saturdays, featuring a menu including Wagyu meatloaf, made-to-order fried chicken and disco fries.

data.status: bringing its health-focused menu to Haddon Township this May
data.short_description: Goodness Bowls is opening a new franchise location at 225 Haddon Ave. in Haddon Township, NJ this May, co-owned by Nico Corsaro and his parents. The fast-casual concept serves customizable açaí and other bowl bases, along with salads, wraps, smoothies and cold-pressed juices.

data.status: transitioning the restaurant into a more approachable concept
data.short_description: Baton Rouge tapas spot Solera at 4205 Perkins Road is closing as its owners convert the space into a new concept called Southdowns Grille. The space has been refreshed with a more open layout, a dedicated to-go counter, and a renovated bar.

data.status: set to open in mid-April
data.short_description: Southdowns Grille, a new American comfort food concept from the owners of the former Solera, is set to open in mid-April at 4205 Perkins Road in Baton Rouge. The menu, led by Executive Chef Eric Sibley, features blue crab fritters, steak frites, baked lasagna, 25 wines by the glass and 10 signature cocktails.

data.location: 3347 N University Dr, Coral Springs, FL 33071
data.status: no opening date has been announced
data.short_description: Big Whiskey's American Restaurant & Bar has filed permit applications to open at 3347 N. University Drive in the Cornerstone development in Coral Springs, FL. The brand, founded in 2006, is known for classic American fare including ribs, steaks, chicken wings, and an extensive whiskey selection.

data.event_date: Soft opening late April 2026; grand opening May 1, 2026
data.status: set to open in April 2026
data.short_description: Oakland-based food truck Carnitas Carnitas Zamora is opening a brick-and-mortar restaurant at 6633 Bancroft Avenue in East Oakland, in the former home of Mi Zacatecas. Owner Alejandro Rocha plans a soft opening in late April and a grand opening on May 1, with a menu featuring traditional Michoacán-style pork served by the pound or in tacos with handmade corn tortillas.

data.status: hopes to welcome customers in May once health permits are approved
data.short_description: The Macaron Shop SD is preparing to open its first brick-and-mortar location at 6780 Miramar Road, Suite #110 in San Diego, in the former home of Gyrogrill. Owner Juliana Lopez is targeting a May opening pending health permit approval, offering handmade custom French macarons including classic, seasonal, and printed designs.

data.location: 8492 S Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90044
data.status: grand opening on April 6, 2026
data.short_description: Panda Express opened a new location at 8492 S. Vermont Avenue in Los Angeles on April 6, 2026, featuring the brand's new "Panda Home" design blending Chinese-inspired elements with modern touches. The grand opening included a ribbon-cutting ceremony, a $1,000 donation to the Girls & Boys Clubs of Metro Los Angeles, and free T-shirts for the first 88 customers.

data.status: exact opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Pho N Mor, a Southern California Vietnamese restaurant, is opening a new location at 2437 Park Avenue in The District at Tustin Legacy, marking the brand's first location in Tustin. The menu features pho, bún bowls, Cơm Tấm rice plates, BBQ rolls, and Vietnamese beverages.

data.status: exact opening date has yet to be announced
data.short_description: Bay Area Chinese restaurant Home Eat is opening a new location at 33348 Alvarado-Niles Road in Union City, moving into the former home of The Rose Garden Restaurant in Central Plaza. The brand, founded in 2015 as Fashion Wok, offers Sichuan, Hunan, Taiwanese, and fusion-style dishes across multiple Bay Area locations.

data.location: 423 S Rosemary Ave, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
data.status: restaurant will open summer 2026
data.short_description: David Chang's fried chicken concept Fuku has filed permit applications to open at 423 S. Rosemary Avenue in downtown West Palm Beach, following a recent Coral Gables launch. The brand, which started in 2015, specializes in crispy brined chicken sandwiches, tenders and waffle fries.

data.status: expected to open by mid-May
data.short_description: Empanola is opening a new Central Business District location inside the Holiday Inn at 203 Carondelet St. in New Orleans, targeting a mid-May opening. The new spot will serve the full Empanola menu alongside an expanded beverage program featuring Lavazza coffee, and will also offer third-party delivery and catering services.

data.location: 8657 Villa La Jolla Dr, La Jolla, CA 92037
data.status: exact opening date has yet to be announced
data.short_description: Fast-casual Chinese-inspired mini bowl concept Tigawok is preparing to open its sixth location at 8657 Villa La Jolla Drive, Suite 103 in La Jolla Village Square, in the former home of Voqozo. The brand currently operates locations in Los Angeles, Burbank, and Irvine, with the La Jolla site placing it near UC San Diego.

data.location: 9900 S Santa Monica Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90212
data.status: expected to open in 2027
data.short_description: Hospitality group Noble 33 is opening a 12,000-square-foot Japanese steakhouse and sister izakaya concept at Rosewood Residences Beverly Hills, expected in 2027. The steakhouse will spotlight Japanese steak while the izakaya will focus on small plates and ramen, with design inspired by traditional Japanese aesthetics with modern twists.

data.status: listed as "coming soon" on the company's website
data.short_description: Tigawok is expanding to Chino Hills, CA as one of two new Orange County locations, listed as "coming soon" on its website. The fast-casual Chinese-inspired mini bowl brand currently operates in Los Angeles, Burbank, and Irvine.

data.status: listed as "coming soon" on the company's website
data.short_description: Tigawok is expanding to Lake Forest, CA as one of two new Orange County locations, listed as "coming soon" on its website. The expansion follows the brand's existing Irvine presence and continues its growth across suburban Southern California communities.

data.status: search is still ongoing
data.short_description: New Parkway Theater, a community cinema and cafe concept based in Oakland, is seeking a second Bay Area location between 10,000 and 18,000 square feet, with no address yet confirmed. The expansion is partly driven by post-pandemic financial pressures, and the new site is expected to include three to four screening rooms, a cafe, kitchen, and community areas.

data.location: 4505 Ashford Dunwoody Rd NE Suite 190, Dunwoody, GA 30346
data.status: officially opened its doors
data.short_description: Le Faucheur Tearoom opened on April 3, 2026 in Dunwoody, GA, bringing a European-inspired afternoon tea experience to metro Atlanta. Founded by Valerie Fatemi and her business partner Kourosh, the boutique tearoom offers curated afternoon tea service, special celebration packages, and private event bookings.

data.status: will soon be offering full sit-down dine-in services
data.short_description: El Pegao, a Latin American cuisine spot currently operating at 763 Broadway in downtown Lorain, is relocating to a larger storefront on Broadway to offer full sit-down dine-in service. The new address has not yet been announced as the team is still in the process of moving.

data.status: preparing to shut down
data.short_description: The Lighthouse Seafood, a family-owned seafood restaurant at 1212 Fredericksburg Rd in San Antonio, announced its permanent closure via Facebook, with its final days of operation on Monday and Tuesday (April 7 being the last day). The decade-old restaurant, open since 2016, was known for fried shrimp, fish sandwiches, and clam chowder.

data.status: debuted on April 2
data.short_description: Hearth & Vine, a New American restaurant and bar by hospitality company Apicii, opened on April 2, 2026 in Portland's historic Henry Weinhard Brewery building in the Pearl District. The concept features a seasonal Pacific Northwest-focused menu, a wine program with 50+ wines by the glass, and a private event space called HW's Malt & Hop House, with an outdoor patio slated to open later this spring.

data.status: Brooklyn Grand Opening
data.short_description: Prince St. Pizza is celebrating its Brooklyn Grand Opening at 271 Smith Street on April 23, marking its first NYC expansion since its original Nolita debut in 2012. The opening includes a fashion collaboration with Italian sportswear brand Sergio Tacchini, with co-branded uniforms, limited-edition pizza boxes, and a renamed signature slice.

data.location: 908 N Flagler Dr, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
data.status: grand opening on April 10, 2026
data.short_description: Sweet Melody Ice Cream is opening at The Hive in Flagler Village at 908 N Flagler Drive on April 10, 2026, with public doors opening at 4 PM. Grand opening celebrations include $1 scoops from 4–7 PM, a DJ, giveaways, and a donation of 10% of sales on April 11–12 to Women In Distress of Broward County.

data.status: opened in the heart of Downtown Dallas on Thursday, April 2
data.short_description: Luna Roja, a modern Mexican restaurant, opened at 1525 Elm St in Downtown Dallas on April 2, 2026. The concept features regional Mexican shareable plates, a TacoKase experience, craft cocktails, and a curated tequila selection, with service spanning breakfast, lunch, dinner, and weekend brunch.
